LanguageData.VVE_Flying_Approved.stages.0.description: I was in an air vehicle. I loved it.
LanguageData.VVE_Flying_Approved.stages.0.label: boarded an air vehicle
LanguageData.VVE_Flying_Horrible.stages.0.description: I was in a flying vehicle. It was horrible.
LanguageData.VVE_Flying_Horrible.stages.0.label: boarded an air vehicle
LanguageData.VVE_Flying_Required.stages.0.description: It has been a lil while since I've soared the skies.
LanguageData.VVE_Flying_Required.stages.0.label: aerophilia (more than 1 day)
LanguageData.VVE_Flying_Required.stages.1.description: I need to fly, I'm getting very antsy.
LanguageData.VVE_Flying_Required.stages.1.label: aerophilia (more than 5 days)
LanguageData.VVE_Flying_Required.stages.2.description: Enough is enough, I'm feeling the call of the open skies! I want to fly!
LanguageData.VVE_Flying_Required.stages.2.label: aerophilia (more than 10 days)
LanguageData.VVE_Flying_Required.stages.3.description: ICARUS FLEW TOO CLOSE TO THE SUN, BUT I'M GONNA CATAPULT YOU THERE IF I CAN'T FLY SOON!
LanguageData.VVE_Flying_Required.stages.3.label: aerophilia (more than 20 days)
